name: open-music-player
description: Player musicale gratuito con Audius e testi LRCLIB.

scripts.check: node --check app.js && node --check server.js && node --check scripts/prepare-capacitor.js
scripts.cap:sync:android: npm run build:android-web && npx cap sync android
scripts.cap:open:android: npm run cap:sync:android && npx cap open android
